hero.title: AgriPedia Egypt
hero.subtitle: An Egyptian platform with a scientific vision for more advanced and sustainable Arab agriculture
hero.text: Accurate agricultural knowledge is no longer optional; it is the foundation for better decisions and more efficient, sustainable crops.

pillars.title: Trusted science
pillars.text: Knowledge grounded in research and analysis

pillars.title: Practical application
pillars.text: Tools and programs made to be used

pillars.title: An Arab vision
pillars.text: From Egypt to the Arab world

about.title: Modern agriculture is an integrated scientific system
paragraphs: Agriculture is no longer a set of inherited practices or experience repeated from one season to the next. It has become an integrated scientific system in which soil, water, climate, nutrition, plant physiology, pests, diseases, quality, and economics interact.

With climate change, rising input costs, limited water resources, greater pest pressure, and stricter quality, export, and processing requirements, access to accurate information has become essential rather than optional.

AgriPedia Egypt was founded to provide trusted agricultural content in Arabic, linking scientific research with field experience and presenting knowledge clearly and practically for agricultural engineers, growers, researchers, students, investors, and everyone working across the agricultural sector.

journey.title: A reference for the crop’s complete journey
journey.text: The platform aims to build a comprehensive agricultural reference that supports understanding from initial crop planning through land preparation, soil and water analysis, cultivar selection, irrigation and fertilization management, growth monitoring, diagnosis, pest and disease management, harvest, quality, marketing, and processing.

steps.title: Planning
steps.text: Define the goal, environment, and crop

steps.title: Analysis
steps.text: Read soil and water before deciding

steps.title: Establishment
steps.text: Prepare land and select cultivars and seedlings

steps.title: Protection
steps.text: Diagnosis and pest and disease management

practice.title: Beyond theoretical text
practice.text: We ensure that information is more than theory. It is usable knowledge supported by examples, tables, practical programs, digital tools, agricultural calculators, scientific studies, and critical analysis.

impact.title: Measured results, not repeated practices
impact.text: We believe agricultural success is measured not only by yield, but by the efficiency of every cubic meter of water, every unit of fertilizer, and every field operation—and by the ability to produce a sound, safe, marketable crop with a genuine economic return.

items.title: Water efficiency
items.text: More value from every cubic meter

items.title: Quality and safety
items.text: A crop fit for markets and processing

principles.title: More informed and precise agricultural decisions
principles.text: AgriPedia Egypt seeks to promote diagnosis before treatment, prevention before intervention, integrated management instead of random solutions, and the use of data and analysis instead of relying entirely on guesswork.

items.title: Diagnose before treating
items.text: Identify the cause before choosing an intervention.

items.title: Prevention first
items.text: Stop problems before their costs rise.

items.title: Integrated management
items.text: Connect cultural, biological, and chemical measures.

items.title: Data over guesswork
items.text: Base decisions on monitoring, analysis, and measurement.

audience.title: Specialized knowledge for every agricultural decision-maker
audience.text: Clear content that respects different levels of experience and serves professionals, learners, and investors across the agricultural sector.

library.title: Explore the agricultural encyclopedia
library.text: Organized scientific and practical guides that help you reach the information you need quickly and clearly.

cards.title: Tuta absoluta
cards.desc: A comprehensive IPM guide covering economic importance, the nature of damage, monitoring, and correction of common misconceptions.

cards.title: Other Crops & Pests (Soon)
cards.desc: New sections are being prepared to expand the encyclopedia with more pests, diseases, crops, and agricultural practices.

closing.title: From Egypt to the entire Arab world
closing.text: We are building a modern agricultural library that respects science, understands reality, supports development, and puts specialized knowledge within reach of everyone pursuing better agriculture and a more sustainable future.
closing.signature: AgriPedia Egypt — Science understood, experience applied, results measured.
